title: Delish Delights - Recipe Website
hero.title: Featured Recipe: Pizza Margherita
hero.subtitle: Simple, delicious, and perfect for any night in.
product1.name: Pizza Margherita
product1.desc: Classic Italian pizza with fresh basil, mozzarella, and tomato sauce.
product1.instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 475°F (245°C).
2. Roll out pizza dough on a floured surface.
3. Spread tomato sauce evenly.
4. Add slices of fresh mozzarella and basil leaves.
5. Drizzle with olive oil and season with salt.
6. Bake for 12-15 minutes until crust is golden.
7. Slice and enjoy warm.
product2.name: Sushi
product2.desc: Delicate rolls with fresh fish, rice, and nori seaweed.
product2.instructions:
1. Rinse sushi rice until water runs clear.
2. Cook rice and season with rice vinegar, sugar, and salt.
3. Place nori on bamboo mat, spread rice thinly.
4. Add fish, avocado, cucumber.
5. Roll tightly and slice with wet knife.
6. Serve with soy sauce, wasabi, and pickled ginger.
product3.name: Burger
product3.desc: Juicy beef patty with lettuce, tomato, cheese, and special sauce.
product3.instructions:
1. Season beef patty with salt and pepper.
2. Grill over medium-high heat for 4-5 minutes per side.
3. Toast buns lightly.
4. Assemble burger with lettuce, tomato, cheese, and sauce.
5. Serve with a side of fries or salad.
lookbook.title: Cooking Tips
lookbook.desc1: Don’t let your veggies get cold feet! High heat sears flavor and locks in juiciness.
lookbook.desc2: Measure twice, bake once — precision is the name of the game. And remember, the proof is in the pudding!
lookbook.desc3: Keep the pan hot but not flaming mad. Quick tosses bring out the aroma without burning the daylights out of your ingredients!
about.title: About Delish Delights
about.story: Founded in 2026, Delish Delights is a recipe blog dedicated to bringing joy, flavor, and culinary adventure into every kitchen. Our goal? To make cooking approachable, fun, and a treat for all the senses.
about.mission: We share recipes, tips, and inspiration — helping everyone turn everyday meals into memorable experiences. Cooking isn’t just about food; it’s about culture, creativity, and connection.
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.text: Have questions, suggestions, or want to share your own recipe? We’d love to hear from you!
newsletter.title: Stay in the Loop
newsletter.subtitle: Sign up for recipes, tips, and tasty updates.
